summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional—missing fixture files (label-rules.conf, test-fixtures/*.files/*.conf) referenced throughout workflow and scripts. Workflow cannot execute test cases. Additional issues: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (GH Actions best practice violation); test case definitions duplicated across workflow YAML and run-tests.sh validation logic (lines ~80-130 in workflow, repeated in run-tests.sh sections 2-3); fragile output validation via exact string matching breaks on minor formatting changes; glob_match regex building is manual and error-prone without unit tests. Script logic itself is decent (proper error handling, quoted vars, set -euo pipefail) but overall solution has significant architectural problems even if files were provided.
